title: What TA39 does for you
subtitle: A teacher uploads student work. TA39 reads it, gives feedback in the teacher's voice, and keeps the teacher in control. The flow below groups capabilities by the outcome they deliver — not by how they're built.

columns.title: Steer & report
columns.subtitle: Teacher stays in the driver's seat.

capabilities.name: Build rubrics with AI
capabilities.blurb: Draft and refine criteria in minutes instead of hours.

capabilities.name: Save feedback templates
capabilities.blurb: Capture how you give feedback; reuse across assignments.

capabilities.name: Generate exemplars
capabilities.blurb: AI-made samples show what each score level looks like.

capabilities.name: Teacher-led calibration
capabilities.blurb: Correct AI with deltas; it learns your voice without retraining.

capabilities.name: Canvas + Google Docs (LTI)
capabilities.blurb: Submit through the LMS workflow you already use.

capabilities.name: Canvas Discussions
capabilities.blurb: Feedback on participation, not just essays.

capabilities.name: Google Classroom re-use
capabilities.blurb: Bring in assignments you've already posted.

capabilities.name: Handwritten & voice
capabilities.blurb: Arabic HTR, voice transcription — same feedback loop.

capabilities.name: Revision rounds
capabilities.blurb: See the arc of a student's drafts, not just the final.

capabilities.name: Teacher + Student Copilots
capabilities.blurb: Conversational help in context for both sides.

capabilities.name: Arabic NLP feedback
capabilities.blurb: Native Arabic pipeline — OCR through comments.

capabilities.name: Learning loop
capabilities.blurb: Track student growth across many assignments.

capabilities.name: Class analytics view
capabilities.blurb: Spot patterns across a class, not one paper at a time.

capabilities.name: Multi-language UI
capabilities.blurb: Foundation for Arabic and other locales.

capabilities.name: Arabic RTL reports
capabilities.blurb: Summary reports teachers can hand to students.

capabilities.name: HITL score disputes
capabilities.blurb: Structured way for students to challenge — with teacher in loop.

foundations.name: Agentic TA39
foundations.blurb: The next era: a copilot that acts, not just answers.
